source_name: House of Commons Library election results site
notes: Official Commons Library result site for Westminster constituencies; includes 2024 actual results and 2019 notional results on 2024 boundaries used by the national constituency import.

source_name: House of Commons Library psephology SQLite database
notes: Machine-readable source behind electionresults.parliament.uk. Use for row-level reconciliation of Westminster constituency candidates, votes, parties, electorates, and notional flags.

source_name: ONS parliamentary constituency mid-year population estimates
notes: Official ONS dataset page for parliamentary constituency mid-year population estimates; use where the relevant constituency boundary generation is available.

source_name: Nomis parliamentary constituency population estimates API
notes: Machine-readable Nomis endpoint for ONS small-area population estimates by parliamentary constituency where TYPE460/2010-boundary coverage is appropriate; 2024 constituency rows must be checked against the ONS/Commons dashboard source before use.

source_name: Home Office immigration statistics regional and local authority data
notes: Stable GOV.UK collection page for regional and local authority immigration statistics, including asylum support local-authority tables used to replace proxy constituency asylum context.

source_name: Home Office regional and local authority immigration dataset December 2025
notes: Latest regional/local authority dataset found on GOV.UK on 2026-04-21; refresh logic should check the stable collection page for a newer quarterly asset before each production import.

source_name: Democracy Club API documentation
notes: API documentation for machine-readable election, candidate, and polling-place data. Live API calls may need credentials; use this target to keep candidate-roster workflows anchored to the documented API.

source_name: Ribble Valley election results index
notes: Official election result index covers the 2023 borough result pages, 2019 borough downloads, and uncontested parish/ward notices needed for Ribble Valley review areas such as Bowland and Clayton Le Dale and Salesbury.

source_name: Fylde Borough Results 4 May 2023
notes: Official borough declaration page covers new Fylde wards such as Ansdell and Fairhaven, Carnegie, Freckleton Village, Kilgrimol, Lytham East/West, Rural East/North Fylde, and Wrea Green with Westby.

source_name: Rossendale Borough Council election results 2 May 2024
notes: Official declaration page covers the post-boundary Rossendale wards and should be paired with LGBCE boundary-review evidence before older rows are reinstated.

source_name: West Lancashire 2024 detailed ward election results
notes: Official ModernGov detailed ward-results page for the 2024 West Lancashire local election; use to verify Burscough, Ormskirk, Rural, Skelmersdale, and Tarleton current-boundary rows before promoting the 2023 boundary generation.

source_name: Lancaster City Council Elections 4 May 2023 ward results
notes: Official committee election-result pages cover Bowerham, Halton-with-Aughton and Kellet, Scale Hall, and West End ward rows.

source_name: Pendle 2024 borough election results
notes: Official 2024 borough result page includes Fence and Higham and Waterside and Horsfield rows for Pendle review checks.

source_name: Ribble Valley borough election results 2019
notes: Official 2019 borough result page includes Clayton-le-Dale and Salesbury and related Ribble Valley ward result links for second-contest review.

source_name: Hyndburn 2023 declaration of persons elected PDF
notes: Official Hyndburn democracy PDF confirms the 2023 elected candidates and wards, including Huncoat; the full 2023 result PDF is image-only and needs OCR before row-level import.

source_name: Lancashire County Council 2025 results per division
notes: Official county division result PDF for Burnley Central West, Clayton with Whittle, Preston South West, and Rossendale West winner-signal review.

source_name: Blackburn with Darwen borough election results 2 May 2024
notes: Official Blackburn with Darwen 2024 borough result page includes Darwen East candidate, vote, and elected-flag rows.

source_name: Local Government Boundary Commission for England electoral reviews
notes: Use for every post-boundary and temporal-validation workflow before reinstating older same-name rows.

source_name: ONS Open Geography Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies July 2024 boundaries
notes: Use the official 2024 Westminster constituency boundaries when apportioning local-authority asylum data or reconciling constituency population evidence.

source_name: ONS names and codes for electoral geographies
notes: Use as the canonical current code/name check for every review-gated local area.
